title: brickellia eupatorioides var. chlorolepis
intro: Brickellia eupatorioides var. chlorolepis, also known as False Boneset, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Brickellia eupatorioides var. chlorolepis include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
